description: Componentize CRM entity detail pages (Leads, Contacts) — extract shared SOLID-compliant components from 5284 lines of duplicated god-files; wire bypassed shared components (EntityHeader, SearchFilterBar, ActivityFeed); create cross-entity reusable components (EntityProfileCard, ActivityFilterBar, AiInsightMetricsGrid, ai-insight-transforms utility, EntityErrorState, EntityDetailSkeleton, ConfirmationDialog); reduce page files from 2691/2593 to ~200 lines each
notes: Cross-entity refactoring: leads/[id]/page.tsx (2691 lines) + contacts/[id]/page.tsx (2593 lines) are god-files violating SRP. ContactDetail.tsx (503 lines, model pattern) exists but was never wired. EntityHeader, SearchFilterBar, ActivityFeed shared components exist but are bypassed. AI insight transforms (churnRisk/NBA/engagement) copy-pasted 3 times. This task extracts ~15 shared/entity-specific components following SOLID principles.
